name: Chocolate Snowball
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (163°C). Line a 9-inch metal baking dish with double thickness of aluminum foil.
2. Chop the chocolate and cut the butter into chunks.
3. Combine chopped chocolate, coffee granules, and 1/2 cup water in a heavy saucepan over low heat. Stir occasionally until chocolate is melted.
4. Add butter gradually until melted and fully incorporated with the chocolate mixture. Remove from heat.
5. Beat eggs one at a time into the chocolate mixture.
6. Mix in vanilla extract, pour into prepared baking dish, and bake until a firm crust forms on top (approximately 1 1/2 hours). Allow to cool completely; cover and refrigerate overnight.
7. Invert onto a serving plate, remove the foil from the baked dessert.
8. Whip heavy cream with remaining 2 tablespoons sugar and brandy until stiff peaks form.
9. Spread whipped cream over the surface of the chilled chocolate mousse.
Notes: Per serving: 570 calories, 5g fat
